rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and implication for requirement expressions
Place component type contracts in type scope with visible ports
Generate syntactically valid AGREE annex blocks with proper structure
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component scopes
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
Enclose AGREE contracts in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and architecture grounding details
